title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Federal Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Federal Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!
